Your 3-Step Charm FinderIntroverted Alpha
What is “charm” anyway?
According to the dictionary,charm is the power orquality of giving delight or arousingadmiration.
What isnatural charm? Natural is what comes instinctivelyto a person; what is innate.
Combining that with the definition of charm above…
Natural charm is your innate qualities, your instinctive power, that gives delight or arouseadmiration.
YOU HAVE THAT INSIDE OF YOU.
Then why aren’t you naturally charming the socks off of everyone you meet?
Because if you don’t understand your own inner natural charm, if you’re not relishing it, thenothers literally CANNOT understand or relish it either.
Whatever we put our attention on about ourselves is what others notice.
So if you’re putting zero attention on your own natural charm, then o

either.
Whatever we put our attention on about ourselves is what others notice.
So if you’re putting zero attention on your own natural charm, then others cannot see you in thatway nearly as well as if you are ENJOYING focusing on your own natural charm.
So how do you focus on something?
By getting to understand it, to really know it, inside and out.
That is what we are about to do today in this single most important exercise at IntrovertedAlpha, period.
ALL our clients start with this (and so do our smart readers). ;)
How do you find your natural charm?
Introverted Alpha| Team@IntrovertedAlpha.com 1of11
By understanding your deepest values and your most attractive qualities, which at IntrovertedAlpha we call your Values and Factors.
To understand these, we want to consider the definition

and your most attractive qualities, which at IntrovertedAlpha we call your Values and Factors.
To understand these, we want to consider the definition of a value and a factor.
A valueis what you consider to be most importantin life. Note that a value can be aspirational,too. You don’t have to be executing on it perfectly already in order to hold it dear as a value.
So remember that in the exercise below. Simply choose what speaks to you most, what is mostimportant to you in your heart. Then there is always room to grow into it as we go.
A factor: the literal definition of a factor is thecircumstance, fact, or influence that contributes toa result or outcome.
How and why are we using Values and Factors? Here's how: We're using what's alreadywonderful about you.
It’s the most important thing

sult or outcome.
How and why are we using Values and Factors? Here's how: We're using what's alreadywonderful about you.
It’s the most important thing. It’s elemental to attractiveness, and that's why it's surprising thatwe weren't finding it much or at all, really — certainly not in this form — in the dating adviceindustry.
As you know, a lot of the advice out there is on fitting a certain mold and being a certain way —being gregarious or the center of attention — regardless of whether that actually matches yourValues and Factors or not, if it’s actually consistent with who you are as a man or not.
So instead of going that route, we are starting with what's already wonderful about YOUspecifically.
What you'll find as you go through this Charm Finder exercise is that you are actually prett

ting with what's already wonderful about YOUspecifically.
What you'll find as you go through this Charm Finder exercise is that you are actually prettyextraordinary.
You may not even know half of that yet.
So it’s really exciting for you to discover what's already wonderful about you so you canleverage that to your benefit.
As far as why we're doing it this way, what's wonderful about you is elemental to yourattractiveness, so it just makes logical sense.
When you’re living according to your Values and Factors, it ensures that you come acrossgenuinely.
Introverted Alpha| Team@IntrovertedAlpha.com 2of11
When everything that you’re saying, doing, thinking, and feeling is congruent with your Valuesand Factors, you come across in the best light, and honestly you become irresistible.
What are y

g, thinking, and feeling is congruent with your Valuesand Factors, you come across in the best light, and honestly you become irresistible.
What are your values? Let's explore.
Find Your Values
Now we are going to find your deepest Attractive Values, the ones you hold most dear. Yay!
Step One:As you read through the following list,write down all the words that resonate withyou most.

Step Two:Narrow your list of words to 10. If youhave a lot, it might help to group them intocategories first (for example: adventure, aliveness, and passion). In doing this, a new wordmight even emerge.
Step Three: Narrow down to your top five, and orderthem from first to last in whatever waymakes intuitive sense to you.
Step Four: Write “I am” before each. For example,“I am adventure.” If this doesn’t feel natural,feel free to play with variations such as, “I enjoy feeling x,” “I enjoy experiencing x,” or, “I valuex.” The goal is to playfully relate and stay engaged.
Step Five: Look at your list of value statements,and appreciate them. There is a whole worldinside each of them, and that is what we’

nd stay engaged.
Step Five: Look at your list of value statements,and appreciate them. There is a whole worldinside each of them, and that is what we’re going to discover next.
Introverted Alpha| Team@IntrovertedAlpha.com 5of11
Step Six: For each Attractive Value, ask yourself, “What does this value mean to me?” You cancreate a bullet-point outline and fill in the description of what each means to you.
You can ask yourself…● “Why is that important to me?”● “How do I feel when I’m immersed in this value?”● “What’s an example from my life that illustrates this value?”
Find Your Factors
Now, onto your Attractive Factors! These are the qualities that make you uniquely attractiveacross a mix of three areas: physical attributes, character traits, and interpersonal strengths.
Step One:Choose all

that make you uniquely attractiveacross a mix of three areas: physical attributes, character traits, and interpersonal strengths.
Step One:Choose all that apply from each list below.
Physical Attributes:Great eyesNice hairGreat smileHandsome faceStrong noseNice cheekbonesStrong legsSolid statureWell-groomedGreat postureStrong armsManly handsIn-shape bodyStylishUnique style
Character Traits:HonestForthrightLoyalPersistentDiligentAmbitiousStrong
Introverted Alpha| Team@IntrovertedAlpha.com 6of11

Interpersonal Strengths:EmpatheticCaringKindThoughtfulLovingProtectiveProvidingCuriousGreat listenerEncouragingChillEasy to be withEasy to talk toRelaxedOpenPlayfulAcceptingPleasantFriendly

gKindThoughtfulLovingProtectiveProvidingCuriousGreat listenerEncouragingChillEasy to be withEasy to talk toRelaxedOpenPlayfulAcceptingPleasantFriendly
Step Two:Narrow it to 10 and then five qualities.It's okay if this feels a bit edgy!
Since physical characteristics are listed first, it can be so fun when we ask you, “Okay, what'syour number one factor, and what's most fun about having that?”
Especially if “great body” or “strong arms” is at the top of the list, it’s amazing because we get toask you in our second conversation ever, “What's most fun about having a great body,” or,“What's most fun about having strong arms?”
Introverted Alpha| Team@IntrovertedAlpha.com 7of11
So fun! It’s our favorite. It gives us a laugh, and the more comfortable we can be with what'sattractive about us, the

eam@IntrovertedAlpha.com 7of11
So fun! It’s our favorite. It gives us a laugh, and the more comfortable we can be with what'sattractive about us, the better. It builds confidence in a fun and easy way.
Step Three: Write your Values and Factors as a listside-by-side, like this:I am W I have AI am V I have BI am X I have CI am Y I have DI am Z I have E
Step Fouris to appreciate the words individuallyand as a whole. They represent what youuniquely bring to the table. Amazing!
Step Five: Find the undercurrent. For each AttractiveFactor, ask yourself, “What is most funabout being x?” just as you did with your Attractive Values above.
Here are prompts:
● “Why do I enjoy having this factor?”● “What's an example of me illustrating this factor in my life?”● “What's a specific time that I was compli

pts:
● “Why do I enjoy having this factor?”● “What's an example of me illustrating this factor in my life?”● “What's a specific time that I was complimented on the factor?”
You really can't focus on them too much or ask too many questions because these are you!They’re what women who are drawn to you are going to notice about you.
The more you notice them, the more you have them top of mind. The more you have them topof mind, the more apparent they become to other people. And the more apparent they become,the easier it is for someone to be attracted to you because of them.
How does this all tie into chemistry?
Your values and your factors are what people notice about you. When you're aware of them —much less celebratory of them — you effortlessly turn other people's attention towards thosev

what people notice about you. When you're aware of them —much less celebratory of them — you effortlessly turn other people's attention towards thosevery qualities that are most attractive about you as well.
It also feels great to be around you when you're enjoying yourself.
How do you internalize your Values and Factors?
Introverted Alpha| Team@IntrovertedAlpha.com 8of11
Enhance Your Vibe
How does this all tie into chemistry?
Your Values and Factors are what people notice about you. When you're aware of them (evencelebratory of them!), you effortlessly turn other people's attention towards those very qualitiesas well. When you're enjoying yourself, your vibe feels great for you and for others.
How to best internalize your Values and Factors?
The key is habits: routine-based and opportunit

urself, your vibe feels great for you and for others.
How to best internalize your Values and Factors?
The key is habits: routine-based and opportunity-based. Both! Here’s how:
Create Routine-Based Habits.
Write your Values and Factors on a sticky note or save them on your phone. You can makethemyour lock-screen background.You can write themdown and take a picture (evenincluding something fun, funny, or beautiful in the background if you want!).
Then every single morning for at least one month,repeat them in the mirror with eye contact:“I am diligent. I am benevolent. I am play,” all the way down your Values and Factors.
When you do this over and over, you will feel more comfortable and at ease saying these thingsto yourself. And if you feel uncomfortable talking to yourself, just remember

and over, you will feel more comfortable and at ease saying these thingsto yourself. And if you feel uncomfortable talking to yourself, just remember that of all the peoplewho have ever been and will ever be in your life, your number one relationship is with you.
You are the closest person to yourself. You know yourself better than you know anyoneelse, and no other human being can ever know you the way that you know you.
So connecting with yourself in the mirror is a great way to nourish that relationship. Especiallyfocusing on your Values and Factors, a wonderful thing to do, lays the foundation for othersseeing those same qualities in you as well.
Our clients who do this regularly (or who make their own version sans-mirror, but who do thisdaily) are the ones who get complimented most fr

as well.
Our clients who do this regularly (or who make their own version sans-mirror, but who do thisdaily) are the ones who get complimented most frequently and early… There is a clearcorrelation that we encourage you to capitalize on!
Create Opportunity-Based Habits.
Go through your list of Values and Factors, and choose the top one you’d like to experiencemore of. There's no “right way” to do this; follow your intuition. Which one stands out to you?
Introverted Alpha| Team@IntrovertedAlpha.com 9of11
Throughout your day,find at least one opportunityper dayto express more of that particularValue or Factor. The key is to immerse yourself in it in a playful way. If you find yourself gettinganxious about it, that’s okay and you can simply pause and remember: you're doing this for fun!This i

it in a playful way. If you find yourself gettinganxious about it, that’s okay and you can simply pause and remember: you're doing this for fun!This is for you, and it's for fun.
One of our clients took this to another level by appreciating his Factor of a handsome face. Hewas growing a beard and every time he looked in the mirror (any mirror!) he noticed his beardand felt like such a badass.
Not long after he started working with us, it was Casual Friday at work, and he wore his favoriteyellow t-shirt that he wears often. But this time, women in his office were telling him, “Oh youlook so sexy in that shirt. Have you been working out?”
Of course he’d been working out. He'd always been working out, and he’d worn that shirt amillion times, but the women in his office didn't really notice it

urse he’d been working out. He'd always been working out, and he’d worn that shirt amillion times, but the women in his office didn't really notice it until he noticed himself asattractive. And then it just showed through effortlessly, and they caught on too!
You can think about it like if you feel really nervous, when you're thinking about thatnervousness and then you look nervous, you seem nervous to other people too. They can tellthat you’re nervous.
Same thing if you’re feeling happy. If you’re feeling happy, then you’re looking happy, andpeople notice that. People pick up on it. They’ll even say to you, “You seem happy.”
This is something that you can’t force. Instead, it’s a genuine expression of what you aredwelling on. That’s when it works.
So dwell on awesome stuff! If you're feel

g that you can’t force. Instead, it’s a genuine expression of what you aredwelling on. That’s when it works.
So dwell on awesome stuff! If you're feeling really happy about your amazing body, yourhandsome face or kindness or sense of humor or whatever — that’s what people are going tonotice about you.
Now that you’re all set with the Charm Finder, have a hell of a time being you!
You are about to enjoy being in your own skin more than you have ever enjoyed it in your entirelife.
Other people will pick up on that, and you’ll be NATURALLY CHARMING.
You will have tapped into your innate qualities, your instinctive power, that gives other peopledelight or arouses attractive women’s admiration.
